message:
fix(security): prevent bypass via hook_timeout_ms=0

Setting hook_timeout_ms=0 in config or DCG_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS=0 env var
caused deadline_exceeded() to immediately return true (zero duration
is always "exceeded"), allowing ALL commands through without any
safety checks — a complete DCG bypass.

Fix: Enforce MIN_HOOK_TIMEOUT_MS=10ms floor on the evaluation deadline.
Also simplified deadline_exceeded() since zero-duration is no longer
possible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1011,7 +1011,7 @@ pub fn evaluate_command(
 
 #[inline]
 fn deadline_exceeded(deadline: Option<&Deadline>) -> bool {
-    deadline.is_some_and(|d| d.max_duration().is_zero() || d.is_exceeded())
+    deadline.is_some_and(Deadline::is_exceeded)
 }
 
 #[inline]
